description_long: This is a modern, rectangular sideboard cabinet with a wood-textured body and four white paneled doors on the front. The cabinet stands on slender black metal legs, elevating it above the ground and giving it a contemporary look. One of the doors is shown partially open, revealing a dark interior shelf suitable for storage. The top surface is flat and finished in a wood grain, providing ample space for placing decorative items or practical objects. The back and sides are finished in a darker wood tone, with no visible openings or hardware. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a functional aesthetic suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, offices, or apartment hallways.
description: A modern wood and white-paneled sideboard cabinet with four doors and black metal legs, featuring a flat top and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing four white paneled doors, one of which is open, revealing the interior shelf.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the wood-textured side panel and the depth of the cabinet, with the open door visible at an angle.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid dark wood back panel with no openings or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view highlighting the wood-textured side and the open door extending outward.
